final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input resetn,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] q);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~resetn)
        q <= 8'b00000000;
    else
        q <= {q[6:0], data_in[0]};
end
endmodule
